top_10.rationale: O'Reilly publisher page for 'Python Concurrency with asyncio' by Matthew Fowler — the canonical book on asyncio event loop concurrency in Python. Top publisher, directly on topic.
Manning publisher page for 'Python Concurrency with asyncio' — same definitive book, publisher's own page with full description of event loop, single-threaded concurrency, and asyncio API coverage.
Simon & Schuster official publisher page for 'Python Concurrency with asyncio' by Matthew Fowler — third publisher listing for the definitive book on the query topic.
Google Books catalog entry for 'Python Concurrency with asyncio' — covers asyncio with the entire Python concurrency landscape including multiprocessing and multithreading.
Book chapter 'Working with Event Loops' — directly covers asyncio event loop orchestration in Python 3.4+, directly matching the 'event loop' component of the query.

Book chapter 'Modern Asynchronous Python The Building Blocks' from 'Asynchronous Python Programming with Asyncio and Async/await' (de Groot, 2022) — covers core building blocks of asyncio concurrency.
Book chapter '(A)synchronous Python' — Chapter 1 from 'Asynchronous Python Programming with Asyncio and Async/await' (de Groot, 2022), foundational introduction to async Python and event loop model.
Book chapter 'Concurrency with AsyncIO' from 'Advanced Guide to Python 3 Programming' (Hunt, 2023) — directly covers asyncio concurrency in a published Springer book.
Book chapter 'Asyncio' from 'Deep Dive Python' (Divakaran, 2025) — most recent Springer book chapter on asyncio, published 2025.
'Advanced Guide to Python 3 Programming' (Hunt, 2023) — full Springer book with a dedicated asyncio concurrency chapter; the book-level entry for comprehensive Python 3 concurrency coverage.
